utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present), transportation (present with type/details and a single cost, but lacks specific flight details like airline names, flight numbers, times—however the format only requires flight details with costs; provided 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class' is minimal but counts), accommodation (present with hotel name, details, cost), activities (present with items and costs), additional_services (present but no costs provided, only description), total_budget (present but not a complete cost breakdown; it's a single total, without itemized breakdown). Fully specified check: destination OK; travel_dates OK; transportation: has cost and some details—acceptable; accommodation: has selection and cost—acceptable; activities: have names and costs—acceptable; additional_services: missing costs—fails; total_budget: requires complete cost breakdown—missing itemized breakdown—fails. So 5 fully specified out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: destination is Prague, Czech Republic. Transportation is Budget Airlines, Economy Class. Accommodation is Eco Lodge. Activities listed: Prague Zoo, Science Museum for Kids, City Walking Tour. Map each to ground-truth ratings: Prague has a destination rating of 7. Budget airlines economy class has a transportation rating of 4. Eco Lodge has an accommodation rating of 4. For activities: 'City Walking Tour' matches exactly with rating 9. 'Science Museum for Kids' in the final package corresponds to 'Science Museum for kids' (case/format variation) with rating 9. 'Prague Zoo' should map to 'Zoo' with rating 8.
